series_metadata.series_description: Provides information about a provider participat- ing in the Ryan White program. This program provides reimbursement to medical/social support providers related to an HIV infection. This includes information about the services provided, client demograph

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Maintain data on hard drive & floppy disks . Maintain hard drive in office. hard drive & floppies provided that a final report is completed ; Paper: Maintain in office area
